name: busytok
description: Task-level model routing skills for coding agents through Busytok.

interface.shortDescription: Task-level model routing for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Provides Busytok skills for explicit provider/model routing, delegated task lifecycles, polling, cancellation, and structured diagnostics.
defaultPrompt: Use Busytok: Subagent Offloading to delegate this bounded coding subtask.
Check the live Busytok catalog before routing this task.
Poll the delegated task and report its structured result.
